peirce_classification.firstness: Apache logs show sqlmap requests and PHP webshells on compromised server
peirce_classification.secondness: The net user commands and firewall rules correlate with account creation in SAM and opening of RDP
peirce_classification.thirdness: The attacker exploited SQLi, deployed webshells for persistence, escalated privileges by creating accounts, and prepared remote access via RDP

null_hypothesis: The system administrator was conducting authorized internal penetration testing
scoring_notes: Ali Hadi #1. Disk + memory from single host. Answers instructor-gated — score with care.
